001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.Embedded;
004import androidx.room.Relation;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import java.util.List;
008
009/**
010 * Room relation view that combines a {@link Batch} with its {@link EggGroup} records.
011 */
012public class BatchWithEggGroups {
013
014  @Embedded
015  private Batch batch;
016
017  @Relation(
018      parentColumn = "batch_id",
019      entityColumn = "batch_id",
020      entity = EggGroup.class
021  )
022  private List<EggGroup> groups;
023
024  /**
025   * Returns the batch in this view.
026   *
027   * @return batch entity.
028   */
029  public Batch getBatch() {
030    return batch;
031  }
032
033  /**
034   * Sets the batch in this view.
035   *
036   * @param batch batch entity.
037   */
038  public void setBatch(Batch batch) {
039    this.batch = batch;
040  }
041
042  /**
043   * Returns the egg groups associated with the batch.
044   *
045   * @return list of egg groups, or {@code null} if not loaded.
046   */
047  public List<EggGroup> getGroups() {
048    return groups;
049  }
050
051  /**
052   * Sets the egg groups associated with the batch.
053   *
054   * @param groups list of egg groups.
055   */
056  public void setGroups(List<EggGroup> groups) {
057    this.groups = groups;
058  }
059}
